final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships among 7 concepts: AI、MCP、AI Agent、OpenClaw、AI Skill、蒸馏、CLI.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include all 7 concepts as labeled nodes with visual definitions and relationship connectors between them, laid out for clarity and easy comprehension
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with short definitions and relationship lines/arrows:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable educational atmosphere — exact tone is yours
Color palette: needs a light, easy-to-read direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn paper / sketchbook surface treatment — exact grain and line weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include labels: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concept nodes; each node must have a short plain-language definition; relationship arrows/connectors between related concepts must be visible
Avoid:
